description: Bueng Kan province was created by Royal Decree on 2011-03-23 from eight districts previously part of Nong Khai province. Pre-2011 datasets that join on Nong Khai's then-larger territory should aggregate Bueng Kan and Nong Khai for any pre-2011 comparison.
authoritative_source: Royal Gazette publication of the Royal Decree creating Bueng Kan Province (พระราชบัญญัติตั้งจังหวัดบึงกาฬ พ.ศ. 2554); Wikipedia 'Bueng Kan Province' historical section
notes: Founding entry for the historical-mappings table. Eight districts moved from Nong Khai to Bueng Kan: Bueng Kan (district), Pak Khat, So Phisai, Seka, Phon Charoen, Si Wilai, Bung Khla, Bueng Khong Long. The TIS-1099 code 38 was assigned to Bueng Kan and the prior occupant of code 38 was renumbered. Consult original Royal Decree for precise district list and effective dates.
